symbols.name: change of depth unit line, bounds 'fathom depths'

provenance.reference_role: OpenCPN unit/vector/clearance witnesses and S-52 metadata drive generated-owned redraw

symbols.required_change: Replace the marker with the reference-matched fathom depth-unit label glyph and keep it as a unit-boundary symbol, not a point/daymark marker.

semantic_brief.brief: UNITFTH1 is change of depth unit line, bounds 'fathom depths'. It is used as a change of depth unit line, bounds 'fathom depths'. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
semantic_brief.required_shape: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference
safety_invariants: Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family.
Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order.
Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present.
Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
semantic_brief.use_case: change of depth unit line, bounds 'fathom depths'

opencpn_render.label: change of depth unit line, bounds 'fathom depths'
